modules.title: FDA Regulatory Framework
modules.description: Comprehensive overview of FDA laser product regulations, reporting requirements, and the CDRH organizational structure
learning_objectives: Navigate the FDA laser product regulatory structure under 21 CFR
Understand the relationship between CDRH, FDA, and regulatory enforcement
Identify key reporting requirements: Product Reports, Supplemental Reports, and Annual Reports
Recognize the historical evolution of FDA laser regulations
Apply compliance timelines to real-world scenarios

interactive_components.name: Regulatory Timeline
interactive_components.description: Interactive timeline of FDA laser regulation milestones from 1960-2023

interactive_components.name: Form Selection Wizard
interactive_components.description: Interactive tool to determine which FDA form to use based on situation

modules.title: Laser Product Classification (FDA)
modules.description: Detailed exploration of FDA laser product classes, accessible emission limits, and classification procedures
learning_objectives: Distinguish between FDA laser product classes (I, IIa, II, IIIa, IIIb, IV)
Calculate accessible emission limits (AELs) for classification
Identify required controls, indicators, and warnings for each class
Determine classification based on laser specifications

interactive_components.name: Classification Flowchart
interactive_components.description: Interactive decision tree for determining FDA laser classification

interactive_components.name: AEL Calculator
interactive_components.description: Calculator for accessible emission limits based on wavelength and duration

interactive_components.name: Requirements Matrix
interactive_components.description: Side-by-side comparison of requirements for each FDA laser class

modules.title: Laser Notices & Harmonization
modules.description: Understanding FDA Laser Notices, FDA-IEC harmonization, and Laser Notice No. 50 compliance
learning_objectives: Understand the purpose and legal status of FDA Laser Notices
Navigate the harmonization between FDA and IEC 60825-1 standards
Identify which FDA requirements are harmonized vs. unique
Apply Laser Notice No. 50 for IEC-conforming products
Use the correct certification statements for harmonized products

interactive_components.name: Harmonization Comparison
interactive_components.description: Interactive comparison of FDA vs IEC requirements with harmonization status

interactive_components.name: Certification Statement Builder
interactive_components.description: Tool to generate correct certification statements based on compliance pathway

key_patterns: Progressive disclosure for complex regulatory content
Interactive calculation tools for technical content
Case studies from real FDA actions
